さーっ、今日も良い品をいっぱい仕入れてあるよ！<br>お客さん、ぜひ見ていってく:
Step right up, folks! We've got a great haul today—come and take a
look!
……うむ。マーケットは今日も賑やかだな。<br>この後に仕事がなければのんびり見:
Hmm... The market's as lively as ever today. If I don't have work, I'll
take my time browsing and head back...
ひいっ、やめてください！ 渡すから、蹴らないで……: Eek, stop! I'll give it to you, just don't kick me...
<user>は見知らぬ女から突然、タックルを受けた。<br>そのまま羽交い絞めに:
The Commander was suddenly tackled by an unknown woman and put
in a headlock.
白昼堂々、強盗をやらかしたのはお前だな？<br>セレストさまの前で犯行に及ぶとは:
So you're the one who pulled a heist in broad daylight? You've got
some nerve committing a crime right in front of Lady Celeste!
……お前、警備隊か？ ちょうどいい！<br>今、あっちに強盗犯が逃げ――:
Hey, you're with the guard? Perfect timing! The robber ran off that
way—
捕まらないとでも思ったのか、このお馬鹿さんめ。<br>まぁっ、おかげさんであたし:
Did you think you wouldn't get caught, you dummy? Well, thanks to
you, I get the credit!
美味しいなぁっ……ボーナス出ちゃうかも？ むふふっ。: Sweet... Maybe I'll even get a bonus? Mufufu.
あーはいはい分かった分かった。昼間っから強盗するくらい、<br>お腹が空いてるの:
Uh-huh, sure sure, I hear ya. Must be starving to heist in broad
daylight? Save your excuses and sob story for the station and come quietly.
うるさいっての強盗犯もといボーナスくん。<br>えーと、ヒトヨンマルマル、逮捕、:
Shut it, you robber—I mean, bonus boy. Let's see... 1-4-0-0, arrest,
and... done.
（結局、警備隊の詰所まで連れ込まれてしまったぞ……）: (So they dragged me into the guard station after all...)
それじゃ、調書とるよー。<br>名前と生年月日、ここに書いて。:
Alright, I'm taking your statement. Name and date of birth, write 'em
here.
いい加減、話を聞いてくれ。俺は強盗犯じゃない。<br>犯人は別にいる。逃げるとこ:
Will you listen to me already? I'm not the robber. The real thief is
someone else—I saw him run off.
またつまんない言い訳をするねぇ……往生際が悪いよ？: More boring excuses? You don't know when to quit, do you?
事実なんだからしょうがないだろう。<br>お前の上司はいないのか？:
But it's the truth, so what can I do? Don't you have a superior or
something?
なんか用事があるって出掛けてる。: They went out on some errand.
っていうか、何？ あたしが女だから舐めてるの？<br>強盗のくせに、女じゃ話にな:
Or what? You looking down on me 'cause I'm a girl? For a robber,
you're the type to say a woman isn't even worth talking to?
そうじゃない。俺のことを知っていそうな人間に<br>取り次いでほしかっただけだ。:
No, that's not it. I just wanted you to call someone who might know
me. Isn't there anyone else here besides you?
……じゃあ、お前に頼むしかないか。被害者の店主を呼び出してくれ。<br>俺の潔白:
...Then I guess I'll have to rely on you. Call the victim shopkeeper. He
can prove I'm innocent.
だから、今はあたししかいないから無理だってば。<br>あんたを１人にできない。:
Like I said, I'm the only one here, so it's no good. I can't leave you
alone.
俺のことは椅子にでも縛り付けてもいいから、さっさと行ってきてくれ。<br>ここで:
You can tie me to a chair or something. Just go already. That'll get
things moving way faster than dragging this out here.
とかなんとか言って、あたしがいなくなったら逃げるつもりでしょ？<br>縄抜けとか:
Oh sure you say that, but you'd just slip out the second I'm gone,
wouldn't you? Escape artist routine.
心配なら牢にでもぶちこんでおけばいいだろう！<br>さっきからまったく話が進んで:
If you're that worried, throw me in a cell! We're getting nowhere like
this!
当たり前でしょーが！ こちとら、お前の茶番に付き合ってる暇はないの！<br>逃が:
Obviously! I don't have time for your little act! And I'm not about to
let you go!
あたしにお金を運んでくれるボーナスちゃんだもん。<br>大人しく罪を認めて手柄が:
You're my little bonus, here to bring me money. So until you confess
quietly and I get my credit, I'm not letting you go anywhere.
あたしはお金が大好き。でも面倒と仕事は大嫌い。: I love money. But I hate trouble and work.
あんたは、そんなあたしのもとに降ってきた、千載一遇のチャンスっ……！<br>むふ:
And you're a once-in-a-lifetime chance that fell right into my lap!
Mufufu!♪
さっさと罪を認めなさい。恨むなら、<br>あたしみたいな不良警備員に捕まる自分の:
Just confess already. And if you're gonna hold a grudge, blame
yourself for being dumb enough to get caught by a lousy guard like me.
（こいつ、自分で不良って言ってしまってるぞ……<br>頼むから早くまともな奴が来:
(She's gone and called herself a delinquent...
Please, hurry up and get someone competent here...)
うぉーい、セレストー。<br>マーケットで強盗を捕まえたって聞いたけど、本当かぁ: Hey, Celeste! Heard you caught a robber at the market. That true?
あ、警備隊長！ さっすが耳が早い♪: Ah, Guard Captain! As expected, you've got quick ears!♪
そうです！ あたしが！ あたしが捕まえました！<br>現行犯です！ 電光石火の逮: That's right! I caught him! Caught in the act! Lightning-fast arrest!
ほう？ まさか、サボり魔のお前がなぁ……: Huh? Never thought it'd be you, the chronic slacker...
えへへへへへ。ボーナス、出ちゃったりします？<br>しますよね？: Ehehehehehe. So, the bonus... It's coming, right? Right?
まぁ、考えてやらんとな。<br>で、肝心の強盗犯は？: Well, I'll consider it. So, where's the actual robber?
こいつです！ 自分はやってないとか言い張ってますけど<br>すぐに搾り上げます！:
This guy! He's insisting he didn't do it, but I'll wring the truth out of
him!
何度か会ったことがあるな。ミレスガルドから<br>派遣されている警備隊の、警備隊:
We've met a few times. You're the Guard Captain of the security
patrol from Milesgard, right?
あ、あの、え、えっと……な、なぜ、ここにあなたが？: Ah, um, er... w-why are you here?
あたしが捕まえたからです！ 逃げるところをタックルして！<br>こう――ぐわぁぁ:
Because I caught him! I tackled him as he was running! Like
this—Rrraaaghh! And locked his arms tight!
た、隊長？ 急に叫ぶと、血圧が上がりますよ……？:
C-Captain? Shouting like that'll raise your blood pressure, you
know...?
余計な心配はせんでいい！ この大馬鹿野郎が！<br>お前、自分が何をしたのか分か:
Don't worry about me! You absolute moron! Don't you realize what
you've done?
やかましいっ！ 誤認逮捕だ！ やる気のない奴だとは思っていたが<br>ここまで馬:
Shut up! False arrest! I knew you were lazy, but this stupid... As
Guard Captain, I'm docking your salary!
あぁ、いや、隊長――何もそこまでしなくても。迷惑だったのは事実だが<br>俺は身:
Ah, no, Captain—there's no need to go that far. It's true I was
troubled, but if my innocence is proven, that's fine by me.
えっ……？<br>やだ、あなた――ひょっとしていい人なの？ 何者？: Huh...? Wait, you—are you actually a good person? Who are you?
お気持ちは大変ありがたいのですが、それでは他の者に示しがつきません！<br>処分:
I appreciate your kindness, but that won't serve as a lesson to the
others! Please leave the punishment to me!
うるさーい！ さっさと真犯人を捕まえてこい！: Quiet! Get moving and catch the real criminal!
構わん。それより、さっきの女――セレストと言ったか。<br>どういう奴だ？:
It's fine. More importantly, that woman earlier—her name was Celeste,
right? What kind of person is she?
本人も自称していますが、とんだ不良警備員ですよ……<br>金、酒が生き甲斐で素行:
She calls herself a guard, but she's a delinquent who lives for money
and drink. Her behavior's atrocious. She's a real piece of work.
それでもお前がクビにしないのは、腕が立つからだな？:
Even so, the reason you haven't fired her is because she's capable,
right?
（あいつに捕まったとき、飛び掛かられるまで一切気配がなかった）:
(When that woman grabbed me, I didn't notice her at all until she
pounced.)
（俺は武力に自信はないが、司令官として危機察知能力は備えている。<br>その俺が:
(I don't have confidence in combat, but as Commander I have
situational awareness. And yet I didn't notice her charge at all.)
（使いこなせれば、面白い人材になりそうだ）: (If I can put her to use, she might become an interesting asset.)
すまん、なんでもない。ちょっとセレストを探してくるよ。: Sorry, it's nothing. I'll go look for Celeste.
（強盗犯を追うと言っていたから、おそらくマーケットだろう。<br>行ってみるか）:
(She said she was going after the robber, so she's probably at the
